data.description: BANK OF AMERICA RAISES CEO MOYNIHAN'S PAY TO $41M FROM $35M

data.title: X3 Holdings (Nasdaq: XTKG) reports positive results from Annual General Meeting in Singapore on Feb.13, 2026.
data.description: Singapore, February 13, 2026 - X3 Holdings Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: XTKG), a renowned global provider of digital solutions and technology services across various sectors, disclosed the successful passing of all shareholder resolutions during its annual general meeting. The Company, also known as XTKG, operates in a wide array of industries.

data.title: X3 Holdings (Nasdaq: XTKG) receives Nasdaq delisting notice on Feb 10, 2026 due to failure to meet requirements.
data.description: In Singapore on February 13, 2026, X3 Holdings Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: XTKG) revealed that on February 10, 2026, they were issued a determination letter by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC concerning a failure to meet certain requirements. The letter highlights areas where the company did not meet the Nasdaq's stipulations.

data.title: Badger Meter (NYSE:BMI) declares $0.40 per share dividend, increases repurchase by $75M, totaling $150M.
data.description: The Board of Directors at Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE:BMI) has announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per share for shareholders of record on February 27, 2026, with a payment date of March 13, 2026. Additionally, they have approved a $75 million increase to the Company’s share repurchase authorization. This addition supplements the initial $75 million approved in November 2025, resulting in a total share repurchase authorization of $150 million.

data.title: Ambow Education Holding Ltd. files Form 10-K for fiscal year 2025 with SEC. Global innovator of AI-powered phygital solutions.
data.description: In Cupertino, California, on February 13, 2026, Ambow Education Holding Ltd. disclosed the filing of its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. Ambow Education Holding Ltd., known as "Ambow," operates as a global leader in AI-powered phygital solutions catering to education, conferencing, and events. The company, listed on NYSE American as AMBO, continues to innovate in blending physical and digital realms.

data.title: Artist John R. Lowery releases "Humble Decade: The Art of Humble Donkey" book detailing his artistic journey.
data.description: Acclaimed Texas artist John R. Lowery has recently entered the realm of literature with his debut book, "Humble Decade: The Art of Humble Donkey," now available. This book marks a new venture for Lowery, showcasing his reflective collection that spans over a decade. The work explores the artistic journey of "Humble Donkey" through a series of written reflections. The book offers readers a unique perspective on the creative process and artistic evolution of Lowery, inviting them to delve into the world of this Texas talent.
TRUMP: VOTER ID IN MIDTERMS WHETHER APPROVED BY CONGRESS OR NOT

data.title: Mon Power and Potomac Edison to build new natural gas power plant in Maidsville, WV on 35-acre site. Plan aims to ensure reliable and affordable power for customers.
data.description: Mon Power and Potomac Edison, both subsidiaries of FirstEnergy Corp., have recently announced their approval for the construction of new gas and solar generation facilities in the Integrated Resource Plan. This decision, made public on February 13, 2026, in Fairmont, West Virginia, is aimed at ensuring the reliability and affordability of power for customers. The selected 35-acre site will host these new facilities, marking a significant step towards enhancing the energy infrastructure. This development aligns with the companies' commitment to meeting the growing energy demands efficiently.

data.title: CEO of Royce Stone Capital warns of instability in $3 trillion private credit market, advocates for asset-backed models.
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia, on February 13, 2026, the private credit market on a global scale is growing rapidly, surpassing an estimated value of $3 trillion. Significant shifts are ongoing within the industry, characterized by a more widespread adoption of payment-in-kind (PIK) interest and changing practices in lending.

data.title: Baltimore Marriott Waterfront celebrates 25 years, opened in 2001, welcomed millions of guests, cornerstone of Inner Harbor.
data.description: In Baltimore on February 13, 2026, the Baltimore Marriott Waterfront celebrated a significant milestone - its 25th anniversary. The hotel, established in 2001, stands as a prominent figure in Baltimore's Inner Harbor, catering to millions of guests over the years. It has been a key player in the hospitality industry, hosting various events and functions since its inception.

data.title: CenterWell acquires MaxHealth from Arsenal; MaxHealth has 82 clinics, 80K+ patients in FL; CenterWell is nation's largest senior-focused primary care provider.
data.description: A primary care organization named MaxHealth, located in Florida, operates a total of 82 clinics, both owned and affiliated. They offer healthcare services to over 80,000 patients through value-based care programs. Additionally, CenterWell Senior Primary Care stands out as the leading senior-focused primary care provider in the United States.

data.title: Enpro boosts quarterly dividend to $0.32/share, payable on Mar 18, 2026, to shareholders as of Mar 4, 2026.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Enpro (NYSE: NPO) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.32 per share, scheduled to be paid on March 18, 2026. The dividend will be given to shareholders recorded by the company as of March 4, 2026.

data.title: Perfect Corp. offers APIs for DeveloperWeek Hackathon, offering $2,500 cash prizes; promotes AI-driven consumer experiences.
data.description: Perfect Corp., a top provider of AI and AR beauty and fashion tech solutions, has revealed its involvement in the DeveloperWeek 2026 Hackathon. The event will occur both in person at the San Jose Convention Center from February 18 to 20, 2026, and online from February 2 to 20, 2026. In the Global Hackathon Challenge, Perfect Corp. plans to grant $2,500 in cash rewards to two victors who create immersive web or mobile experiences using Perfect’s AI and AR technologies.

data.title: HCM IV Acquisition Corp. closes $287.5M IPO with 28,750,000 units sold at $10 each, trading on Nasdaq as HACQU.
data.description: HCM IV Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: HACQU) recently closed its initial public offering, selling 28,750,000 units at $10.00 per unit, including 3,750,000 additional units from the underwriter's over-allotment option. These units consist of one Class A ordinary share and one-fourth of a redeemable warrant. The warrants can be exercised to purchase one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share. The Company's units started trading on February 12, 2026, on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol "HACQU," with expectations for individual listings of Class A ordinary shares and warrants under the ticker symbols "HACQ" and "HACQW," respectively.

data.title: Faraday Future's stockholders approve share authorization to support 2026 FX Super One and EAI Robotics deliveries.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) disclosed the outcomes of its Special Meeting of Stockholders on February 13, 2026. Stockholders agreed to raise the amount of authorized shares of the Company's Class A and Class B common stock as well as preferred stock. This move marks a significant development for the California-based global intelligent electric mobility ecosystem firm.

data.title: Cboe Global Markets declared a dividend of $0.72 per share for Q1 2026.
data.description: In Chicago on February 13, 2026, Cboe Global Markets, Inc., a prominent derivatives and securities exchange network, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.72 per common stock share for the initial quarter of 2026.

data.title: National Cancer Prevention Month promotes PSA screenings by ProCure Proton Therapy Center for detecting prostate cancer early. #ProstateCancer #PSAScreenings #CancerPrevention
data.description: A proton therapy center in Somerset, New Jersey, has emphasized the importance of prostate-specific antigen (PSA) screenings for men during National Cancer Prevention Month. The center, ProCure, is urging men to prioritize these screenings as they are a vital initial step in detecting prostate cancer early. Detecting prostate cancer early can significantly improve outcomes. The announcement was made on February 13, 2026.

data.title: MercadoLibre, Inc. (Nasdaq: MELI) to report Q4 2025 results on Feb 24, 2026, including video webcast and conference call at 5:00pm ET.
data.description: Uruguay-based company MercadoLibre, Inc. (Nasdaq: MELI) has disclosed plans to report its financial outcomes for the fourth fiscal quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, on February 24, 2026. The company is scheduled to conduct an earnings results video conference, along with a conference call and audio webcast, on the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties, including investors, analysts, and the broader market audience, can access the video webcast and live audio during the event.

data.title: ETH open interest hits 3-year low, sparking talks of potential short squeeze and Ether rally to $2,500.
data.description: According to traders, Ethereum is experiencing a decrease in open interest and futures funding rates, which could pave the way for a major short squeeze on bearish leveraged positions. This may lead to a potential rally pushing the price up to $2,500.
New Chief Executive Officer, Stephen H. Willard, appointed by Longeveron®.
